attacking_style: Launches long-range aggressive attacks in mountain breakaways, capable of building and holding multi-minute gaps over strong climbers on category climbs.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns; appears to operate independently in breakaway scenarios.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with long climbs (e.g., Col d'Ambodon) where sustained climbing power allows him to build gaps; less effective on tactical finale climbs requiring composure.
vulnerability: Tactical immaturity in high-pressure breakaway situations, particularly when managing cooperation with rivals on final climbs; emotional control issues under stress.
key_patterns: Aggressive breakaway rider capable of holding significant time gaps over quality climbers (2-minute advantage).
Struggles with in-race decision-making and collaboration, allowing rivals to escape through poor tactical choices.
Demonstrated ability to win after extended drought, suggesting resilience but inconsistent form/opportunity.
form_trajectory: negative: Despite UAE Tour win, Giro showed tactical regression with costly errors. Long win drought (4+ years) suggests inconsistency.
